rag_rules: AGREE contracts must be placed in component type scopes for port references; implementation bindings go in component implementation scopes
Assume and guarantee statements are only allowed in component types, not implementations
generic_rules: Fix unresolved references by ensuring all identifiers are declared or visible in the current scope
Validate that expression types match expected AGREE types (int, real, bool) for helper declarations
Remove invalid AGREE clauses when root references cannot be resolved instead of adding architecture
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annexes must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Component implementations cannot contain assume/guarantee statements; these must be in component types
anti_patterns: Do not place assume/guarantee statements in component implementations; they must be in component types
irrelevant_topics: AADL package references and with clauses
Component type vs implementation scope distinctions beyond AGREE contract placement
